scripts.install: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.typecheck: (cd backend && npx tsc --noEmit) && (cd frontend && npx tsc -b --noEmit)
scripts.test:all: (cd backend && npm test) && (cd frontend && npm test) && (cd aar-studio && npm test)
